visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) An Asian man with short black hair and glasses is positioned in the foreground, wearing a black T-shirt and a blue lanyard with a white identification badge. He raises his right hand, gesturing with his index finger while holding a black smartphone in his left hand. The setting is a rooftop balcony with a clear view of numerous high-rise residential buildings and several large yellow construction cranes against a bright sky. (2) The camera pans to the right, revealing a wide perspective of an urban park area with manicured green hedges, patches of dry brown grass, and a paved walkway. A person is seen riding a three-wheeled delivery vehicle along the path. In the distance, a wide river flows past a city skyline with multiple skyscrapers on the far bank. (3) The smartphone is brought into a close-up view, occupying most of the frame. The screen displays a camera application interface showing a highly zoomed-in shot of the delivery person on the path below. The zoom increases until the screen of the delivery person's own smartphone is clearly visible and sharp. (4) The man points at the phone screen to highlight the detail. Small text and icons are visible on the camera UI. The lighting is natural and bright, suggesting the late afternoon sun illuminating the urban landscape and the subject's face.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: vivo. [Slogan]: Brave New Origin. (2) [Slogan]: vivo X100 Pro. [Logo]: ZEISS.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 delivery person in distance, 1 reflected person
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian man with black hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a black t-shirt, and a blue vivo lanyard.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An urban city view featuring tall residential buildings, construction cranes, a river with a distant skyline, and a landscaped park area with a road.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking with a moderate-to-high pitch and clear articulation, sounding enthusiastic. He is in an outdoor environment with a faint but constant background hum of urban traffic. (2) A second male voice briefly replies in a supportive tone. The primary speaker continues his narration with a fast tempo, describing a visual experiment. (3) The main speaker's volume increases slightly as he highlights the effectiveness of the zoom. The acoustic space sounds open, consistent with an outdoor balcony. (4) The speech ends on a conclusive, high-energy note. No sound effects or background music are present in the audio track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Introduction -> Field Test -> Result Demonstration
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate the extreme telephoto zoom capability of the vivo X100 Pro smartphone by zooming in from a distant balcony onto a delivery person's phone screen.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker is wearing a vivo brand lanyard and badge while showcasing a specific vivo smartphone model's camera features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a practical, high-contrast demonstration to showcase hardware performance in a relatable urban setting.
